message:
style(engine): apply rustfmt across 50 source and test modules

Automated rustfmt pass reformatting long assert_eq!() calls with inline
struct initializations to multi-line format, breaking long array literals
and function argument lists across lines, and alphabetizing import
order. No semantic changes to any logic, types, or test coverage.

Affected modules include adversarial_coevolution_harness, ambient_authority,
bayesian_posterior, canonical_encoding, checkpoint, closure_model,
conformance_catalog, compiler specialization modules, disruption_scorecard,
eprocess_guardrail, migration_contract, northstar_scorecard,
parser_error_recovery, proof_specialization_receipt, reputation,
revocation_freshness, runtime_diagnostics_cli, spectral_fleet_convergence,
trust_zone, ts_module_resolution, and 30 others.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
